intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inconsistent with the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare soil. P3 (Pothos) is present with the rabbit anchor. P4 (Silver Guest) is present as a single stem.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains only substrate; no visible botanical growth.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot contains only substrate; no visible botanical growth.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos leaf remains stable; rabbit anchor present.
plant_audit.P4: Single stem shows signs of progressive wilting and postural collapse over the 5-day period.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Substrate appears consistently damp/dark across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments observed in P4; electronic component (IC chip) present on desk surface in early images, removed by current.
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of white charging case (AirPods style) in current image; removal of electronic component from desk surface.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: Minimal change; P4 stem remains upright.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: P4 stem shows slight downward curvature.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Significant postural collapse of P4 stem; lighting conditions darkened.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: P4 stem remains collapsed; desk surface cleared of electronic debris; white charging case introduced.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: P3 is stable. P4 is in a state of terminal decline/senescence. P1 and P2 are non-viable/empty.
anomalies: Electronic component (IC chip) in early frames
White charging case in current frame
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is largely dormant or failing. While the Pothos (P3) maintains structural integrity, the primary occupant of the black pot (P4) is undergoing rapid senescence. The yellow pot (P1) and the secondary black pot (P2) show no signs of life, indicating systemic loss of the registered specimens. The desk environment has been cleared of small electronic components, replaced by a charging case.
